hook: Clarity about intent is easier to hear when it does not sound like a demand for instant certainty.
body: People often respond better when the conversation allows room for honesty instead of forcing a binary answer under pressure.

hook: Men sometimes ask high-stakes questions in a way that quietly punishes anything less than the answer they want.
body: Invite truth more than reassurance. People often respond better when the conversation allows room for honesty instead of forcing a binary answer under pressure.
A calm conversation about where each person is and what they are looking for often gets you more reality than a dramatic make-or-break moment.
